HomePage.headline: Explore Cancun on your own terms
HomePage.subheadline: Premium cars, transparent pricing, and instant booking. No surprises.
HomePage.feature1Description: The price you see is the price you pay. Insurance and taxes included.
HomePage.feature2Description: We deliver the car to you. No need to find a rental counter.
HomePage.feature3Description: Book in minutes and receive your confirmation immediately.

LoginPage.title: Sign in
LoginPage.description: Access your account or sign in with email and password.
LoginPage.registeredSuccess: Account created successfully. Sign in to continue.

RegisterPage.title: Create your account
RegisterPage.description: Fill in your details to start booking.

RegisterForm.errorInvalid: Invalid data. Please check the form.

BookingsPage.customerHelper: All your active and past bookings.

ReservationPage.heading: Reservation date range demo
ReservationPage.helper: This example keeps validation, blocked days and proxy submission at the UI boundary while the backend remains the owner of availability logic.
ReservationPage.locationDescription: Simple boundary field wired through the shared Zod contract.
ReservationPage.timezoneDescription: Captured from the browser and forwarded to NestJS without adding business rules in Next.js.
ReservationPage.dateRangeDescription: Blocked days come from a fixture here, but the field stays ready for API-driven availability.
ReservationPage.submitError: Reservation proxy failed. Verify the NestJS availability endpoint or RENTAL_API_BASE_URL.
ReservationPage.mapDescription: Leaflet stays behind one SSR-safe wrapper while the route remains a Server Component and Motion lives only in leaf clients.
ReservationPage.mapEmpty: Pickup points will appear here once the UI fixture or API source is available.

BookingNewPage.heading: Book a vehicle
BookingNewPage.helper: Select your travel dates. A deposit will be required to confirm the booking.
BookingNewPage.submitError: Failed to create booking. Please try again.
BookingNewPage.conflictError: This vehicle is already booked for the selected dates.

BookingConfirmationPage.pendingHelper: This usually takes a few seconds. Hang tight.
BookingConfirmationPage.timeoutHelper: It may take a moment to reflect. Check your booking status in a few minutes.
BookingConfirmationPage.confirmedHelper: Your reservation is all set. See you in Cancun!
BookingConfirmationPage.cancelledHelper: This booking was cancelled or the payment did not go through.

BookingDetailPage.heading: Booking details
BookingDetailPage.depositHelper: Pay the deposit below to confirm your booking.

VehicleCatalogPage.heading: Our fleet
VehicleCatalogPage.helper: Browse available rentals in Cancun. Prices are per day, all-included.
VehicleCatalogPage.emptyDescription: We're updating our catalog. Please check back shortly.

VehicleDetailPage.pickupNote: We'll coordinate delivery upon booking confirmation. No extra charge.
VehicleDetailPage.cancellationText: Modify or cancel your booking up to 48h before pickup, free of charge.

AdminBookingsPage.title: Bookings
AdminBookingsPage.subtitle: All reservations across the platform. Manage status transitions.

UserAdminPage.title: User management
UserAdminPage.subtitle: View and manage user roles and frequent customer status.

VehicleAdminPage.title: Fleet management
VehicleAdminPage.subtitle: Create, edit, and remove vehicles from the rental catalog.
VehicleAdminPage.emptyState: No vehicles in the catalog yet.

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this vehicle? This action cannot be undone.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
